title: experiment.anchored.v1 payload
description: Payload of the experiment.anchored.v1 event — hash-anchor notification for a previously-registered QueryExperiment (domain/experiment-registration), reusing the audit-ledger hash-chain pattern (docs/architecture/wave4-plan.md 'Reuse saena_domain.audit hash chain + canonicalization (no new hashing rule)'). Registration ONLY — NO outcome/DiD/causal/lift fields.
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024). Authority: docs/architecture/wave4-plan.md 'Existing vs new events' (w4-10 Contracts Steward deliverable — team-lead field list 'hash-anchor notification (experiment id, canonical hash, previous hash/anchor)'). NEW AsyncAPI channel, same wave4-plan.md authorizing-document rationale as experiment.registered.v1 (see that schema's $comment for the full citation). Producer experiment-attribution-service. engine_id REQUIRED — same ADR-0013 'experiment 계열' rule as experiment.registered.v1 (allOf $ref to common/engine-id/v1's engine_required_payload fragment). previous_hash's anyOf[null, sha256_ref] shape is verbatim-mirrored from domain/audit-event/v1#/properties/prev_event_hash (genesis anchor in an experiment's hash chain uses null when this IS the first anchor entry — same rationale: 'genesis event uses null, chain head has no predecessor' — pre-included now rather than added later as a closed-class-adjacent widening).

experiment_id.$comment: Opaque identifier for the registered experiment being anchored (domain/experiment-registration.experiment_id) — same identifier space as experiment.registered.v1.

canonical_hash.$comment: team-lead field list 'canonical hash' — the hash of the experiment state being anchored at this point in the chain.

previous_hash.$comment: team-lead field list 'previous hash/anchor' — verbatim-mirrors domain/audit-event/v1#/properties/prev_event_hash's anyOf[null, sha256_ref] shape and genesis-null rationale.
